# Postmortem: [Incident Title]

## Date: YYYY-MM-DD
## Authors: [Names]
## Status: [Draft | Reviewed | Final]

## 1. Executive Summary
Brief summary of the incident, impact, and duration.

## 2. Timeline
- HH:MM: Issue started.
- HH:MM: Alert triggered.
- HH:MM: Mitigation applied.
- HH:MM: System recovered.

## 3. Root Cause
Detailed technical explanation of what caused the failure.

## 4. Resolution

## 5. Action Items
